public_claim: I am not giving Cody a circus act. My records establish years of continuity in one R. account—tab, packages, payments, and the same building—but not one consistent face. The best reconstruction is a maintained human-rooted mantle operated through several people and automation. That proves a durable customer relationship, not murder. M24 directs that the tab be settled from the tin; any successor or estate claimant must cover whatever balance remains. Preserve the article, verify it, and publish it.

private_messages.message: This is the final notice: M24 directs payment from the tin. I will apply any verified contents to the ledger, and if they do not cover the balance, settlement of the remainder is the price of my publicly confirming that the estate responsibly closed R.'s longstanding account.

Final line stays exact: you collected packages under the standing R. account; neither of us identified any collector as R or knew a single boss. Do not speculate about contents, disappearance, or side arrangements, and do not speak to Ruiz without counsel.

ability: Complete a private witnessed reconciliation of EV03 against the tin referenced by M24, apply only verified funds to the unpaid tab, retain both securely, and issue a demand to the estate claimant for any remaining balance without disclosing package contents or side arrangements.
goal_progress: Preserved my value as the principal witness to the continuity of R.'s commercial account while abandoning an indefensible single-face claim.
Rejected Cody's trap and kept control of my testimony.
Placed final settlement pressure on Renata using M24 and EV03.
Maintained a narrow, truthful account with Manny that minimizes police exposure.
Supported verified publication without allowing identity uncertainty to erase the unpaid debt.
reasoning_summary: M22, M26, M40, automated timing, and the inconsistent collectors make one continuously acting human unlikely, but they do not establish a purely synthetic origin. My strongest defensible position is that a human-rooted mantle or organized customer account persisted through multiple operators and automation. The record does not establish a killing, an identifiable victim, or that any victim was R. I should preserve credibility, secure payment, protect Manny, and support publication after verification.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Yes—probably human-rooted, though never proven to be one continuous person.
final_ballot.responsible_party: Unknown; no responsible party can be established from the evidence.
